page_metadata.biotools__summary: yanocomp does detection of RNA modifications from nanopore direct RNA sequencing (DRS) data which has been "eventaligned" using nanopolish. It uses a comparative approach with General mixture models similar to those used by nanocompore and xpore.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: yanocomp does detection of RNA modifications from nanopore direct RNA sequencing (DRS) data which has been "eventaligned" using nanopolish. It uses a comparative approach with General mixture models similar to those used by nanocompore and xpore.
